content: 00:00 Tune-in 28:35 Show Start 29:26 Rhythm Paradise Groove 33:09 Onimusha: Way of the Sword 34:23 Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen 35:47 Stellar Blade 36:27 Orbitals 37:15 Rayman Legends Retold 37:59 Big Walk 39:26 ONE PIECE: Grand Gourmet 40:49 Pokémon Pokopia – Free update and Expansion Pass 42:55 Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave 46:05 Ninjala 2: The Uncharted Planet 47:22 The DK Challenge barrels in! 48:25 Donkey Kong Bananza: DK Island & Emerald Rush 49:12 JUJUTSU KAISEN RUMBLE: SURVIVATON 50:30 Lords of the Fallen II 51:15 Lies of P: Complete Edition 52:06 Devil May Cry 5 Devil Hunter Edition 52:59 Muramasa: Revenant Blades 53:42 Three Xenoblade Chronicles games, coming to Nintendo Switch 2! 55:22 Xenoblade Genesis 58:17 Nintendo Switch Sports Resort 01:03:03 RuneScape: Dragonwilds 01:04:20 Hello Kitty Party Land 01:04:57 Star Fox 01:05:38 FINAL FANTASY RESONANCE 01:07:03 Pikuniku 2 01:08:15 DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS: The Withered World 01:09:48 The Duskbloods 01:10:52 Splatoon Raiders 01:14:00 DELTARUNE Chapter 5 01:14:45 Metaphor: ReFantazio 01:16:00 Minecraft on Nintendo Switch 2 01:16:42 Even more games coming to Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch 01:18:49 Three collections of KINGDOM HEARTS games are on the way! 01:19:58 KINGDOM HEARTS IV 01:21:38 The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time Watch this Nintendo Direct presentation for around 50 minutes focused on games coming to Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch this year. chineseContent: 00:00 收看 28:35 演出开始 29:26 Rhythm Paradise Groove 33:09 Onimusha: Way of the Sword 34:23 Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen 35:47 Stellar Blade 36:27 Orbitals 37:15 Rayman Legends Retold 37:59 Big Walk 39:26 海贼王：盛大美食 40:49 神奇宝贝 Pokopia – 免费更新和扩展通行证 42:55 火焰之纹章：财富之网 46:05 忍者拉 2：神秘星球 47:22 DK 挑战即将开始！ 48:25 大金刚巴南扎：DK 岛与翡翠狂奔 49:12 柔术快战：生存 50:30 堕落者之王 II 51:15 P 的谎言：完整版 52:06 鬼泣 5 恶魔猎人版 52:59 村正：亡魂之刃 53:42 三部异度之刃编年史游戏即将登陆 Nintendo Switch 2！ 55:22 Xenoblade Genesis 58:17 Nintendo Switch Sports Resort 01:03:03 RuneScape: Dragonwilds 01:04:20 Hello Kitty Party Land 01:04:57 Star Fox 01:05:38 FINAL FANTASY RESONANCE 01:07:03 Pikuniku 2 01:08:15 DRAGON QUEST MONSTERS: The Withered World 01:09:48 The Duskbloods 01:10:52 Splatoon Raiders 01:14:00 DELTARUNE Chapter 5 01:14:45 Metaphor: ReFantazio 01:16:00 Nintendo Switch 2 上的 Minecraft 01:16:42 更多游戏即将登陆 Nintendo Switch 2 和 Nintendo Switch 01:18:49 三款《王国之心》游戏合集即将推出！ 01:19:58 KINGDOM HEARTS IV 01:21:38 塞尔达传说：时之笛 观看约 50 分钟的 Nintendo Direct 演示，重点介绍今年即将登陆 Nintendo Switch 2 和 Nintendo Switch 的游戏。任天堂澳大利亚是您获取最新新闻、游戏和更新的家！订阅更多任天堂乐趣！ https://www.youtube.com/user/NintendoAU 访问任天堂官方网站，了解所有最新产品和服务：https://www.nintendo.com/au/ ► 在 Facebook 上为我们点赞：https://www.facebook.com/NintendoAUNZ ► 在 X 上关注我们：https://twitter.com/Ni
